name: Cheese-Topped Beef and Potato Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the beef, onion, and celery until browned.
2. Stir in tomato sauce, mushrooms, water, salt, sugar, and pepper.
3. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low.
4. Simmer for 5 minutes.
5. Spoon 1/3 of the beef mixture into a 9x13-inch baking dish.
6. Arrange half of the potato slices on top.
7. Repeat with the remaining beef mixture and potato slices.
8. Cover the dish with foil.
9. Bake at 375°F for 1 hour, or until potatoes are tender.
10. Remove from the oven and discard the foil.
11. Sprinkle with cheese.
12. Return to the oven just until the cheese melts.
